summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin User Management feature. All backend APIs (22 tests) and frontend flows passed. Admin can login, see 6 module cards including User Access with ADMIN badge, manage users (CRUD), and regular users are correctly restricted.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: Admin login with futureroads/@@U1s9m6c7@@ returns token with role=admin and 6 modules including user_access
Backend: Regular user login with Lew/Lew123 returns token with role=user and 5 modules (no user_access)
Backend: Invalid credentials rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/admin/users returns all 7 seeded users
Backend: GET /api/admin/modules returns 5 available modules
Backend: POST /api/admin/users creates new user successfully
Backend: Duplicate username rejected with 400
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} updates user
Backend: Password update works correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} removes user
Backend: Cannot delete system admin (user-admin-001)
Backend: Regular user gets 403 on all admin endpoints
Backend: Unauthenticated requests denied
Frontend: Admin login flow (heart click → 5s EKG → login form → /hub)
Frontend: Admin hub shows 6 module cards including User Access with ADMIN badge
Frontend: User Access card navigates to /user-access
Frontend: User Access page shows all 7 users in table with correct columns
Frontend: Admin row has shield icon, ADMIN badge, edit button, NO delete button
Frontend: Regular user rows have edit + delete buttons
Frontend: ADD USER form opens with all fields (username, password, email, phone, role, modules)
Frontend: Create new user works - user appears in table
Frontend: Edit user form pre-fills with existing data
Frontend: Update user works
Frontend: Delete user works
Frontend: BACK TO HUB button navigates to /hub
Frontend: Logout button works
Frontend: Regular user (Lew) sees only 5 module cards (NO User Access)
Frontend: Regular user direct access to /user-access redirects to /hub
seed_data_creation: 7 users seeded on backend startup (futureroads admin + 6 regular users)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin user management feature fully functional. Backend uses MongoDB with JWT auth. Login flow has 5-second EKG animation. Admin sees 6 module cards, regular users see 5. User Access page at /user-access is admin-only with full CRUD. System admin (user-admin-001) cannot be deleted.
mocked_api_note: Dashboard stats, subscribers, devices are mocked. Email sending is mocked (no RESEND_API_KEY).
